# BioCalc AI

> AI-powered laboratory toolkit for molecular biology, microbiology, and biochemistry — with 15 scientifically accurate calculators, an expert AI lab assistant, protocol summarizer, experiment planner, and reagent helper.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of calculators and AI tools for biotech labs.
- [About](/about): What BioCalc AI does, why it was built, and how it stays accurate.
- [Calculators](/calculators): Browse 15 lab calculators covering molecular biology, microbiology, biochemistry, and general lab math.
- [AI Lab Assistant](/assistant): Chat with an AI trained for molecular biology, cloning, CRISPR, cell culture, enzyme kinetics, and more.
- [Protocol Summarizer](/protocols): Paste or upload PDF/DOCX/TXT protocols to extract steps, materials, reagents, safety notes, and common mistakes.
- [Experiment Planner](/planner): Describe your goal, equipment, and budget to get a structured experimental plan with workflow, controls, and troubleshooting.
- [Reagent Helper](/reagents): Generate reagent recipes, prep steps, storage conditions, and safety notes from natural-language descriptions.
